_notice: ALL RECORDS BELOW ARE FICTIONAL. This file illustrates the STRUCTURE of the service-navigation model (resource directory, Goal -> Action Item -> Need pathways, resource linkage, and individualized plan copies). It does not correspond to any actual person, organization, program, or production record. The hierarchy illustrates the model only.
_evidence_tier: Invented sample. Field concepts reconstruct the documented model; every value was invented for demonstration. No production record value is represented.
_conventions: Identifiers use SAMPLE- prefixes; the only email domain is the RFC-reserved example.invalid; URLs use https://example.invalid/; no realistic street address or phone number appears anywhere in this file.

organizations.note: Fictional organization operating two fictional programs (demonstrates one organization with multiple programs).

pathway_templates.note: Fictional reusable template pathway: one Goal, three Action Items (one optional), four Needs. Demonstrates a three-level hierarchy, a multi-Action-Item pathway, a multi-Need Action Item, an optional step, and a step-level supporting-resource link.

steps.goal_summary: Participant can reliably reach work, medical, and benefits appointments (fictional).
steps.rationale: Transportation gaps block most other plan steps (fictional rationale).

steps.step_title: Submit the Example Mobility Program application (fictional)
steps.step_summary: Complete and submit the fictional program application.
A current photo ID is required by the fictional application; the linked supporting resource can replace a missing one.
Any fictional document showing current residence (demonstrates an Action Item with multiple Needs).
Attend the fictional orientation session after application approval.
Optional add-on registration for riders who want a companion (demonstrates an optional step).

individual_plans.note: Fictional individualized copy of SAMPLE-PATH-001. Demonstrates that the copy preserves step_type, step_code, and parent references while adding person-specific status fields. No real plan or person is represented.
